examples: The editor's office used to be occupied by founder Dewitt Wallace, who, along with his wife, Lila Acheson Wallace, launched Reader's Digest in 1922 with condensed articles from other publications.
This is Lila. Please call your mom.
Swing into action only after your child has aired the entire list of grievances, advises Lila.
For every act of violence meted out to her, Lila has a swift response.
CNN's Greg Botelho, Lila King, Julie Cannold and Dominique Dodley contributed to this report.
